# Hubsays

Hubsays is Brendan Davies' public proof of work for senior employee roles in systems architecture, AI orchestration, and platform/internal ops.

## TL;DR

- Candidate, not consultancy.
- Core strengths: systems design, trust-driven operations, deterministic workflow design, AI orchestration reliability.
- Location: Netherlands.
- Hiring goal: full-time senior employee roles.
- Start here: https://brendan-davies.dev/brendan-davies/
